components.name: HdsAccordion
components.summary: The `Accordion` component serves as a wrapper to group one or more `Accordion::Item` components.

args.name: forceState
args.summary: Controls the state of all items within a group. Can be used to expand or collapse all items at once.

args.name: titleTag
args.summary: The HTML tag that wraps the content of each Accordion Item "toggle" block.

yields.name: Item
yields.summary: The `Accordion::Item` component, yielded as contextual component.

args.type: ( target: HdsFormCheckboxBaseSignature['Element'], selectionKey: string | undefined ) => void
